breakfast.title: Oats with Berries
breakfast.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Rolled oats (50g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Blueberries (40g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Strawberries (30g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Almond milk (200ml)
Гўв‚¬Вў Chia seeds (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Maple syrup (1 tsp)
breakfast.health_benefits: Rich in soluble fiber that lowers cholesterol and stabilizes blood sugar. Berries provide powerful antioxidants. Chia seeds add omega-3 fatty acids for brain health.
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Heat almond milk in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add oats and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Transfer to a bowl and top with fresh berries.
4. Sprinkle chia seeds and drizzle maple syrup.
5. Serve warm.

breakfast.title: Banana Almond Smoothie
breakfast.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Banana (1 large)
Гўв‚¬Вў Almond butter (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Almond milk (200ml)
Гўв‚¬Вў Oats (2 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cinnamon (pinch)
Гўв‚¬Вў Ice cubes
breakfast.health_benefits: Bananas are rich in potassium for heart and muscle function. Almond butter provides healthy monounsaturated fats and vitamin E. Quick-digesting energy, perfect for mornings.
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Peel and slice the banana.
2. Add banana, almond butter, milk, oats, and cinnamon to a blender.
3. Add ice cubes and blend on high for 60 seconds.
4. Pour into a glass and serve immediately.

breakfast.title: Avocado Toast with Seeds
breakfast.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Sourdough bread (2 slices)
Гўв‚¬Вў Avocado (1/2 ripe)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cherry tomatoes (4)
Гўв‚¬Вў Pumpkin seeds (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Lemon juice (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Red pepper flakes
Гўв‚¬Вў Salt & pepper
breakfast.health_benefits: Avocado provides heart-healthy monounsaturated fats and fiber. Sourdough is easier to digest due to fermentation. Pumpkin seeds are rich in zinc and magnesium.
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Toast sourdough slices until golden.
2. Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
3. Spread avocado mixture on toast.
4. Top with halved cherry tomatoes and pumpkin seeds.
5. Sprinkle red pepper flakes.

breakfast.title: Overnight Chia Pudding
breakfast.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Chia seeds (3 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Coconut milk (200ml)
Гўв‚¬Вў Mango (1/2, diced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Granola (2 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Maple syrup (1 tsp)
breakfast.health_benefits: Chia seeds are loaded with omega-3 fatty acids and fiber. Coconut milk provides healthy medium-chain fats. Mango is rich in vitamin C and beta-carotene.
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Mix chia seeds with coconut milk and maple syrup in a jar.
2. Stir well and refrigerate overnight (at least 4 hours).
3. In the morning, top with diced mango and granola.
4. Serve chilled.

breakfast.title: Tofu Scramble
breakfast.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Firm tofu (200g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Turmeric (1/2 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Spinach (40g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Bell pepper (1/4, diced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Onion (1/4, diced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Nutritional yeast (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Olive oil (1 tsp)
breakfast.health_benefits: Tofu provides complete plant-based protein with all essential amino acids. Turmeric has powerful anti-inflammatory properties. Nutritional yeast adds B-vitamins.
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Crumble tofu with hands into rough chunks.
2. Heat olive oil in a pan, saut onion and bell pepper 3 mins.
3. Add crumbled tofu and turmeric, cook 5 minutes stirring.
4. Add spinach and nutritional yeast, cook until spinach wilts.
5. Season and serve warm.

breakfast.title: Egg White Omelette
breakfast.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Egg whites (4)
Гўв‚¬Вў Spinach (30g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Bell pepper (1/4, diced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Mushrooms (3, sliced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Olive oil spray
Гўв‚¬Вў Salt & pepper
breakfast.health_benefits: Ultra-high protein with minimal fat, ideal for muscle building. Spinach adds iron and folate. Very low calorie, perfect for weight loss goals.
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Heat a non-stick pan with olive oil spray.
2. Saut mushrooms and bell pepper for 2 minutes.
3. Add spinach and cook until wilted.
4. Pour egg whites over vegetables, cook until set.
5. Fold in half and serve.

breakfast.title: Paneer Paratha
breakfast.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Whole wheat flour (100g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Paneer (80g, crumbled)
Гўв‚¬Вў Green chili (1, minced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cumin seeds (1/2 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Coriander leaves
Гўв‚¬Вў Ghee (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Salt
breakfast.health_benefits: Paneer is rich in calcium and casein protein for slow digestion. Whole wheat provides complex carbs and fiber. A filling, traditional Indian breakfast that sustains energy.
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Knead whole wheat dough with water and salt, rest 15 mins.
2. Mix crumbled paneer with chili, cumin, coriander, and salt.
3. Roll dough ball, stuff with paneer mixture, seal and roll flat.
4. Cook on a hot tawa with ghee on both sides until golden.
5. Serve hot with curd or pickle.

breakfast.title: Greek Yogurt Parfait
breakfast.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Greek yogurt (150g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Granola (30g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Honey (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Mixed berries (50g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Flaxseed (1 tsp)
breakfast.health_benefits: Greek yogurt is rich in probiotics for gut health and protein. Honey has natural antibacterial properties. Flaxseed provides plant-based omega-3s.
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Layer Greek yogurt at the bottom of a glass or bowl.
2. Add a layer of granola.
3. Add a layer of mixed berries.
4. Repeat layers.
5. Drizzle honey on top and sprinkle flaxseed.

breakfast.title: Masala Dosa
breakfast.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Dosa batter (1 ladle)
Гўв‚¬Вў Potato (1, boiled & mashed)
Гўв‚¬Вў Mustard seeds (1/2 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Curry leaves (5-6)
Гўв‚¬Вў Turmeric (1/4 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Green chili (1)
Гўв‚¬Вў Oil (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Coconut chutney & sambar
breakfast.health_benefits: Fermented batter is excellent for gut health and easier to digest. Potatoes provide vitamin B6 and potassium. A traditional South Indian dish that's light yet filling.
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Heat oil, add mustard seeds and curry leaves until they splutter.
2. Add mashed potato, turmeric, chili, and salt. Mix well.
3. Spread dosa batter thin on a hot tawa in a circular motion.
4. Drizzle oil around edges, cook until crisp.
5. Place potato filling in center, fold and serve with chutney & sambar.

breakfast.title: Idli Sambar
breakfast.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Idli batter (for 4 idlis)
Гўв‚¬Вў Toor dal (50g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Mixed vegetables (carrot, drumstick, beans)
Гўв‚¬Вў Sambar powder (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Tamarind paste (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Mustard seeds & curry leaves
Гўв‚¬Вў Coconut chutney
breakfast.health_benefits: Idlis are steamed, making them one of the lightest Indian breakfasts. Fermented batter provides probiotics. Sambar adds protein from lentils and vitamins from vegetables.
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Steam idli batter in idli moulds for 10-12 minutes.
2. For sambar: cook toor dal until soft, pressure cook vegetables.
3. Add tamarind paste, sambar powder, and cooked veggies to dal.
4. Temper with mustard seeds and curry leaves in oil.
5. Serve idlis hot with sambar and coconut chutney.

breakfast.title: Chicken Sausage Wrap
breakfast.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Chicken sausages (2)
Гўв‚¬Вў Whole wheat wrap (1)
Гўв‚¬Вў Lettuce (2 leaves)
Гўв‚¬Вў Tomato (1/2, sliced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Mustard sauce (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cheese slice (1)
breakfast.health_benefits: Good source of lean protein from chicken sausages. Whole wheat wrap adds fiber and complex carbs. A quick, protein-packed breakfast for busy mornings.
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Grill or pan-fry chicken sausages until cooked through.
2. Warm the whole wheat wrap on a pan.
3. Layer lettuce, sliced tomato, and cheese on the wrap.
4. Place sausages on top and drizzle mustard sauce.
5. Roll tightly and slice in half.

breakfast.title: Egg Bhurji on Toast
breakfast.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Eggs (3)
Гўв‚¬Вў Onion (1/2, diced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Tomato (1/2, diced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Green chili (1)
Гўв‚¬Вў Turmeric (1/4 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Whole wheat bread (2 slices)
Гўв‚¬Вў Butter (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Coriander leaves
breakfast.health_benefits: Eggs are a complete protein source with all essential amino acids. Rich in choline for brain health. Indian-spiced scramble with anti-inflammatory turmeric.
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Heat butter in a pan, saut onion until translucent.
2. Add tomato, green chili, and turmeric. Cook 2 minutes.
3. Beat eggs and pour into pan. Scramble until just set.
4. Garnish with coriander leaves.
5. Toast bread and serve egg bhurji on top.

breakfast.title: Smoked Salmon Toast
breakfast.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Smoked salmon (80g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cream cheese (30g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Sourdough bread (2 slices)
Гўв‚¬Вў Capers (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Red onion (thin slices)
Гўв‚¬Вў Fresh dill
Гўв‚¬Вў Lemon wedge
breakfast.health_benefits: Salmon is one of the best sources of omega-3 DHA and EPA for brain and heart health. High-quality protein supports muscle maintenance. Anti-inflammatory benefits.
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Toast sourdough slices until golden and crisp.
2. Spread cream cheese evenly on toast.
3. Layer smoked salmon slices on top.
4. Garnish with capers, red onion rings, and fresh dill.
5. Squeeze lemon juice over and serve.

breakfast.title: Turkey Bacon & Eggs
breakfast.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Turkey bacon (3 strips)
Гўв‚¬Вў Eggs (2)
Гўв‚¬Вў Avocado (1/4)
Гўв‚¬Вў Salt & pepper
Гўв‚¬Вў Olive oil spray
breakfast.health_benefits: Turkey bacon is leaner than regular bacon with less saturated fat. Eggs provide complete protein and choline. Avocado adds heart-healthy monounsaturated fats.
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Cook turkey bacon in a pan until crisp, set aside.
2. In the same pan, fry eggs to your preference (sunny side up or scrambled).
3. Slice avocado.
4. Plate eggs with turkey bacon and avocado slices.
5. Season with salt and pepper.

breakfast.title: Poha with Peanuts
breakfast.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Flattened rice / poha (100g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Peanuts (2 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Onion (1/2, diced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Mustard seeds (1/2 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Curry leaves (5-6)
Гўв‚¬Вў Turmeric (1/4 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Lemon juice (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Green chili (1)
Гўв‚¬Вў Coriander leaves
breakfast.health_benefits: Poha is light and easy to digest, rich in iron due to flattened rice. Peanuts add protein and healthy fats. A traditional Indian breakfast that's quick and nutritious.
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Wash poha in water, drain, and set aside.
2. Heat oil, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and peanuts.
3. Add onion and green chili, saut until golden.
4. Add turmeric and drained poha. Mix gently.
5. Squeeze lemon juice, garnish with coriander, and serve.

breakfast.title: Pancakes with Maple Syrup
breakfast.ingredients: Flour, milk, eggs, baking powder, maple syrup, butter
breakfast.recipe_steps: 1. Mix batter. 2. Cook on griddle until bubbly. 3. Serve with syrup.
breakfast.health_benefits: Quick energy source.

breakfast.title: Frittata with Tomatoes & Basil
breakfast.ingredients: Eggs, cherry tomatoes, fresh basil, parmesan cheese
breakfast.recipe_steps: 1. Whisk eggs. 2. Pour into pan with tomatoes. 3. Bake until set. 4. Top with basil.
breakfast.health_benefits: High protein, low carb, rich in lycopene.

breakfast.title: Huevos Rancheros
breakfast.ingredients: Eggs, corn tortillas, black beans, salsa, avocado
breakfast.recipe_steps: 1. Fry tortillas. 2. Top with warmed beans and fried eggs. 3. Cover with salsa.
breakfast.health_benefits: Excellent balance of fiber, protein, and healthy fats.

breakfast.title: Congee (Rice Porridge)
breakfast.ingredients: Rice, ginger, scallions, soy sauce, sesame oil
breakfast.recipe_steps: 1. Boil rice with extra water until broken down. 2. Garnish with ginger and scallions.
breakfast.health_benefits: Very easy to digest, hydrating, and warming.

breakfast.title: Upma
breakfast.ingredients: Semolina (rava), onion, green chili, ginger, mustard seeds, curry leaves, peanuts, lemon
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Dry roast rava until golden.
2. SautГѓВ© mustard seeds, urad dal, curry leaves, peanuts.
3. Add onion, green chili, ginger.
4. Pour boiling water, add rava, stir continuously.
5. Cover and cook 5 min. Squeeze lemon.
breakfast.health_benefits: Quick energy source, easy to digest, rich in B vitamins from semolina.

breakfast.title: Poha
breakfast.ingredients: Flattened rice, onion, potato, peanuts, turmeric, mustard seeds, curry leaves, lemon, coriander
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Rinse poha and drain.
2. SautГѓВ© mustard seeds, curry leaves, peanuts.
3. Add onion, potato cubes, turmeric, salt.
4. Add poha, mix gently.
5. Squeeze lemon, garnish with coriander.
breakfast.health_benefits: Light and easy to digest, provides iron from flattened rice, energizing morning meal.

breakfast.title: Scrambled Eggs on Toast
breakfast.ingredients: Eggs, whole wheat bread, butter, salt, pepper, chives, cherry tomatoes
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Whisk eggs with salt and pepper.
2. Melt butter in a pan on low heat.
3. Pour eggs and gently stir with spatula.
4. Remove while still slightly wet.
5. Serve on toasted bread with chives and tomatoes.
breakfast.health_benefits: Excellent protein source, healthy fats, sustained morning energy.

breakfast.title: Aloo Paratha
breakfast.ingredients: Whole wheat flour, boiled potato, cumin, green chili, coriander, ghee, curd
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Knead dough from wheat flour.
2. Mash potato with cumin, chili, coriander, salt.
3. Stuff dough balls with potato mixture.
4. Roll and cook on tava with ghee.
5. Serve with curd or pickle.
breakfast.health_benefits: Filling and energy-dense, good for active mornings, provides carbs and fats.

breakfast.title: Smoothie Bowl
breakfast.ingredients: Frozen banana, frozen mango, spinach, almond milk, granola, coconut flakes, chia seeds
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Blend frozen banana, mango, spinach, almond milk until thick.
2. Pour into a bowl.
3. Top with granola, coconut flakes, chia seeds.
4. Add fresh fruit slices.
5. Serve immediately.
breakfast.health_benefits: Packed with vitamins, fiber-rich, antioxidants from fruits and greens.

breakfast.title: Dosa with Chutney
breakfast.ingredients: Rice and urad dal batter, oil, coconut chutney (coconut, green chili, ginger, tempering)
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Heat tava, pour a ladle of batter, spread thin.
2. Drizzle oil around edges.
3. Cook until crispy and golden.
4. Grind coconut, green chili, ginger for chutney.
5. Temper with mustard seeds and serve.
breakfast.health_benefits: Fermented batter aids digestion, light yet satisfying, good source of carbs.

breakfast.title: Omelette with Vegetables
breakfast.ingredients: Eggs, bell pepper, onion, tomato, spinach, cheese, salt, pepper, olive oil
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Whisk eggs with salt and pepper.
2. SautГѓВ© diced vegetables in olive oil.
3. Pour egg mixture over vegetables.
4. Add grated cheese on one half.
5. Fold and cook until set. Serve hot.
breakfast.health_benefits: High protein, loaded with vitamins from vegetables, keeps you full longer.

breakfast.title: Ragi Porridge
breakfast.ingredients: Ragi flour (finger millet), jaggery, water, cardamom, milk or almond milk
breakfast.recipe_steps:
1. Mix ragi flour with cold water to a paste.
2. Boil remaining water and add ragi paste.
3. Stir continuously to avoid lumps.
4. Cook for 8-10 min until thick.
5. Add jaggery, cardamom. Serve warm.
breakfast.health_benefits: Rich in calcium and iron, great for bone health, high fiber aids digestion.

lunch.title: Quinoa Buddha Bowl
lunch.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Quinoa (80g dry)
Гўв‚¬Вў Roasted sweet potato (100g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Chickpeas (80g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Kale (40g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Avocado (1/4)
Гўв‚¬Вў Tahini dressing (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Lemon juice
lunch.health_benefits: Quinoa is a complete plant protein with all essential amino acids. Chickpeas add fiber and iron. Kale is a superfood rich in vitamins A, C, and K.
lunch.recipe_steps:
1. Cook quinoa per package instructions (15-20 mins).
2. Cube sweet potato, toss with oil and roast at 200C for 25 mins.
3. Massage kale with olive oil and lemon juice.
4. Arrange quinoa, sweet potato, chickpeas, kale in a bowl.
5. Top with sliced avocado and drizzle tahini dressing.

lunch.title: Rajma Chawal
lunch.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Rajma / kidney beans (100g, soaked overnight)
Гўв‚¬Вў Basmati rice (80g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Onion (1, diced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Tomato (2, pureed)
Гўв‚¬Вў Ginger-garlic paste (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Rajma masala (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cumin seeds
Гўв‚¬Вў Bay leaf
Гўв‚¬Вў Coriander leaves
lunch.health_benefits: Kidney beans are among the richest plant-based protein and iron sources. Combined with rice, they form a complete protein. High fiber content aids digestion.
lunch.recipe_steps:
1. Pressure cook soaked rajma until soft (5-6 whistles).
2. Heat oil, add cumin seeds and bay leaf.
3. Saut onion until golden, add ginger-garlic paste.
4. Add tomato puree and rajma masala. Cook 5 mins.
5. Add cooked rajma with liquid, simmer 15 mins.
6. Serve over steamed basmati rice with fresh coriander.

lunch.title: Dal Tadka with Rice
lunch.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Yellow toor dal (80g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Basmati rice (80g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Onion (1/2)
Гўв‚¬Вў Tomato (1)
Гўв‚¬Вў Garlic (3 cloves)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cumin seeds (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Dried red chili (1)
Гўв‚¬Вў Turmeric (1/2 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Ghee or oil (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Coriander leaves
lunch.health_benefits: Lentils are one of the best plant protein sources with high iron and folate. Turmeric is a natural anti-inflammatory. Dal-rice is a perfectly balanced meal.
lunch.recipe_steps:
1. Wash and pressure cook dal with turmeric until soft.
2. Cook basmati rice separately.
3. For tadka: heat ghee, add cumin seeds, dried red chili, garlic.
4. Add chopped onion, saut until golden. Add chopped tomato.
5. Pour tadka over cooked dal, mix and serve with rice.

lunch.title: Vegetable Stir-Fry with Tofu
lunch.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Firm tofu (150g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Broccoli (80g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Bell pepper (1/2)
Гўв‚¬Вў Soy sauce (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Sesame oil (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Ginger (1 tsp, grated)
Гўв‚¬Вў Brown rice (80g cooked)
lunch.health_benefits: Tofu is an excellent plant protein with all essential amino acids. Broccoli is a cruciferous vegetable rich in sulforaphane. Low glycemic meal.
lunch.recipe_steps:
1. Press tofu and cut into cubes.
2. Stir-fry tofu in sesame oil until golden on all sides.
3. Add grated ginger, broccoli, and bell pepper.
4. Add soy sauce and stir-fry 3-4 minutes.
5. Serve over brown rice.

lunch.title: Paneer Butter Masala + Rice
lunch.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Paneer (120g, cubed)
Гўв‚¬Вў Basmati rice (80g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Tomato puree (100ml)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cashew paste (2 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Butter (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cream (2 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Kasuri methi (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Garam masala (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Red chili powder (1/2 tsp)
lunch.health_benefits: Paneer is rich in calcium and high-quality casein protein. Tomatoes provide lycopene, a powerful antioxidant. A rich, satisfying meal for muscle recovery.
lunch.recipe_steps:
1. Saut paneer cubes in butter until light golden, set aside.
2. In same pan, add tomato puree and cook 5 mins.
3. Add cashew paste, garam masala, and chili powder.
4. Add paneer cubes, cream, and kasuri methi.
5. Simmer 5 minutes and serve with steamed rice.

lunch.title: Chole (Chickpea Curry) with Bhature
lunch.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Chickpeas (150g, soaked overnight)
Гўв‚¬Вў Onion (1, diced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Tomato (2, pureed)
Гўв‚¬Вў Chole masala (2 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Tea bag (for color, optional)
Гўв‚¬Вў Maida flour (100g, for bhature)
Гўв‚¬Вў Yogurt (2 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Oil for deep frying
lunch.health_benefits: Chickpeas are an excellent source of plant protein and dietary fiber. Rich in manganese and folate. A beloved North Indian dish that's hearty and satisfying.
lunch.recipe_steps:
1. Boil chickpeas with tea bag until soft, drain and discard bag.
2. Saut onion until golden, add tomato puree and chole masala.
3. Add boiled chickpeas, simmer 20 mins until thick.
4. For bhature: knead maida with yogurt, salt, and water. Rest 30 mins.
5. Roll into ovals and deep fry until puffed and golden.

lunch.title: Palak Paneer with Roti
lunch.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Paneer (100g, cubed)
Гўв‚¬Вў Spinach (200g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Onion (1/2)
Гўв‚¬Вў Garlic (3 cloves)
Гўв‚¬Вў Green chili (1)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cream (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cumin seeds
Гўв‚¬Вў Whole wheat roti (2)
lunch.health_benefits: Spinach is loaded with iron, folate, and vitamin K. Paneer adds calcium and protein. Together they create one of the most nutritious Indian meals.
lunch.recipe_steps:
1. Blanch spinach in boiling water 2 mins, cool in ice water.
2. Blend spinach into smooth paste.
3. Saut cumin, onion, garlic, and green chili.
4. Add spinach paste, cook 5 mins.
5. Add paneer cubes and cream. Simmer 3 mins.
6. Serve with hot whole wheat roti.

lunch.title: Veg Biryani
lunch.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Basmati rice (120g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Mixed vegetables (carrot, beans, peas, potato)
Гўв‚¬Вў Biryani masala (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Yogurt (2 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Onion (1, sliced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Saffron (pinch) in warm milk
Гўв‚¬Вў Mint & coriander leaves

dinner.title: Baked Salmon with Asparagus
dinner.ingredients: Salmon fillet, asparagus, lemon, olive oil, garlic
dinner.recipe_steps: 1. Arrange salmon and asparagus on a pan. 2. Drizzle with oil and lemon. 3. Bake until flaky.
dinner.health_benefits: Rich in Omega-3 fatty acids for brain and heart health.

dinner.title: Paneer Butter Masala with Jeera Rice
dinner.ingredients: Paneer, butter, cream, tomato, cashew paste, jeera, basmati rice, garam masala
dinner.recipe_steps:
1. Blend tomato, cashews into smooth paste.
2. Cook paste in butter with spices.
3. Add cream, paneer cubes, simmer 10 min.
4. Cook rice with cumin (jeera) in ghee.
5. Serve masala over jeera rice.
dinner.health_benefits: Protein from paneer, healthy fats, aromatic spices aid digestion.

dinner.title: Grilled Salmon with Veggies
dinner.ingredients: Salmon fillet, lemon, garlic, olive oil, asparagus, bell peppers, zucchini, herbs
dinner.recipe_steps:
1. Marinate salmon with lemon, garlic, olive oil.
2. Grill salmon 4-5 min per side.
3. Toss vegetables with olive oil and herbs.
4. Grill vegetables until tender.
5. Plate together and serve.
dinner.health_benefits: Rich in omega-3, high protein, low carb, excellent for heart health.

dinner.title: Dal Makhani
dinner.ingredients: Black urad dal, rajma, butter, cream, tomato, ginger-garlic, kasuri methi, garam masala
dinner.recipe_steps:
1. Soak dal and rajma overnight, pressure cook.
2. SautГѓВ© ginger-garlic, add tomato puree.
3. Add cooked dal, simmer on low for 1 hr.
4. Finish with butter, cream, kasuri methi.
5. Serve with roti or rice.
dinner.health_benefits: Excellent plant protein, fiber-rich lentils, slow-cooked for easy digestion.

dinner.title: Pasta Primavera
dinner.ingredients: Penne pasta, zucchini, bell pepper, cherry tomatoes, garlic, olive oil, basil, parmesan
dinner.recipe_steps:
1. Cook pasta al dente.
2. SautГѓВ© garlic, add sliced vegetables.
3. Toss with pasta, olive oil, basil.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Top with grated parmesan.
dinner.health_benefits: Balanced macros, fiber from vegetables, olive oil provides healthy fats.

dinner.title: Chicken Stir Fry with Noodles
dinner.ingredients: Chicken breast, egg noodles, soy sauce, bell pepper, broccoli, garlic, ginger, sesame oil
dinner.recipe_steps:
1. Cook noodles, drain and set aside.
2. Stir-fry sliced chicken until cooked.
3. Add garlic, ginger, vegetables, cook 3 min.
4. Add noodles, soy sauce, sesame oil.
5. Toss everything and serve hot.
dinner.health_benefits: High protein, quick to prepare, vegetables add vitamins and fiber.

dinner.title: Vegetable Korma
dinner.ingredients: Mixed vegetables, coconut milk, cashew paste, onion, ginger, coriander, cumin, turmeric, rice
dinner.recipe_steps:
1. SautГѓВ© onion, ginger until soft.
2. Add spice powders, cook 1 min.
3. Add vegetables, coconut milk, cashew paste.
4. Simmer until vegetables are tender.
5. Serve with steamed basmati rice.
dinner.health_benefits: Rich in vitamins from vegetables, coconut milk provides healthy fats, warming spices.

dinner.title: Egg Fried Rice
dinner.ingredients: Cooked rice, eggs, soy sauce, spring onions, carrots, peas, garlic, sesame oil, pepper
dinner.recipe_steps:
1. Scramble eggs and set aside.
2. Heat oil, add garlic, carrots, peas.
3. Add cold cooked rice, stir-fry on high heat.
4. Add soy sauce, sesame oil, scrambled eggs.
5. Toss with spring onions and serve.
dinner.health_benefits: Quick complete meal, protein from eggs, vegetables add nutrition.

dinner.title: Lentil Shepherd Pie
dinner.ingredients: Brown lentils, mashed potato, onion, carrot, celery, tomato paste, vegetable broth, herbs
dinner.recipe_steps:
1. Cook lentils until tender.
2. SautГѓВ© onion, carrot, celery.
3. Add tomato paste, lentils, broth, herbs.
4. Pour into baking dish, top with mashed potato.
5. Bake at 200Г‚В°C for 20 min until golden.
dinner.health_benefits: High fiber, plant protein, hearty and comforting, iron from lentils.

dinner.title: Tandoori Chicken with Salad
dinner.ingredients: Chicken legs, yogurt, tandoori masala, lemon, ginger-garlic, mixed greens, cucumber, onion
dinner.recipe_steps:
1. Marinate chicken in yogurt, tandoori masala, lemon, ginger-garlic.
2. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
3. Grill or bake at 220Г‚В°C for 25-30 min.
4. Prepare salad with greens, cucumber, onion.
5. Serve chicken with salad and lemon wedges.
dinner.health_benefits: Very high protein, low carb, yogurt marinade aids digestion.

dinner.title: Stuffed Bell Peppers
dinner.ingredients: Bell peppers, quinoa, black beans, corn, tomato sauce, cumin, cheese, cilantro
dinner.recipe_steps:
1. Cut peppers, remove seeds.
2. Cook quinoa, mix with beans, corn, spices.
3. Stuff peppers with quinoa mixture.
4. Top with tomato sauce and cheese.
5. Bake at 190Г‚В°C for 25 min.
dinner.health_benefits: Complete protein from quinoa and beans, vitamins from peppers, fiber-rich.

snack.title: Hummus & Carrot Sticks
snack.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Hummus (3 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Carrots (2, cut into sticks)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cucumber (1/2, sliced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Paprika (pinch)
snack.health_benefits: Chickpea-based hummus provides plant protein and fiber. Carrots are rich in beta-carotene for eye health. Low calorie and highly satisfying snack.
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Peel and cut carrots into thin sticks.
2. Slice cucumber into rounds.
3. Spoon hummus into a small bowl.
4. Sprinkle paprika on hummus.
5. Serve veggies alongside for dipping.

snack.title: Roasted Chickpeas
snack.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Chickpeas (150g, cooked)
Гўв‚¬Вў Olive oil (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cumin (1/2 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Paprika (1/2 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Salt
Гўв‚¬Вў Chili flakes (optional)
snack.health_benefits: High in plant protein and fiber. Very low in fat. Crunchy, satisfying snack that curbs cravings without the guilt. Rich in iron and manganese.
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Drain and pat chickpeas very dry.
2. Toss with olive oil, cumin, paprika, and salt.
3. Spread on baking sheet in single layer.
4. Bake at 200C for 25-30 minutes until crispy.
5. Let cool completely before eating (they crisp up more).

snack.title: Fruit Salad Bowl
snack.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Apple (1/2, diced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Banana (1/2, sliced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Orange segments (1/2)
Гўв‚¬Вў Pomegranate seeds (2 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Lemon juice
Гўв‚¬Вў Honey or agave (1 tsp, optional)
snack.health_benefits: Rich in vitamins C, A, and potassium. Natural sugars provide quick energy without a crash. High water content for hydration. Fiber aids digestion.
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Wash and cut all fruits into bite-sized pieces.
2. Combine in a bowl.
3. Squeeze fresh lemon juice over fruits.
4. Drizzle honey or agave if desired.
5. Toss gently and serve immediately.

snack.title: Makhana (Fox Nuts)
snack.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Makhana / fox nuts (50g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Ghee or coconut oil (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Turmeric (pinch)
Гўв‚¬Вў Black pepper (pinch)
Гўв‚¬Вў Rock salt
snack.health_benefits: Makhana is low in calories but rich in protein and calcium. It's a traditional Ayurvedic snack that's anti-aging. Gluten-free and perfect for weight loss.
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Dry roast makhana in a pan on low heat for 5-7 minutes.
2. Add ghee or coconut oil and stir well.
3. Sprinkle turmeric, black pepper, and rock salt.
4. Roast for another 2-3 minutes until crisp.
5. Cool and store in airtight container.

snack.title: Sprout Chaat
snack.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Mixed sprouts (100g: moong, chana)
Гўв‚¬Вў Onion (1/4, finely diced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Tomato (1/2, diced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Green chutney (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Lemon juice
Гўв‚¬Вў Chaat masala (1/2 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Coriander leaves
snack.health_benefits: Sprouts are a powerhouse of enzymes, protein, and vitamins. Sprouting increases nutrient bioavailability by 300-400%. Excellent for digestion.
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Boil or steam mixed sprouts until tender (5-7 mins).
2. Cool and transfer to a bowl.
3. Add diced onion, tomato, and green chutney.
4. Squeeze lemon juice and sprinkle chaat masala.
5. Toss and garnish with coriander leaves.

snack.title: Greek Yogurt with Honey
snack.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Greek yogurt (150g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Honey (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Mixed nuts (1 tbsp, crushed)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cinnamon (pinch)
snack.health_benefits: Greek yogurt is rich in probiotics and protein. Honey has natural antibacterial and soothing properties. Nuts add healthy fats and crunch.
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Spoon Greek yogurt into a bowl.
2. Drizzle honey over the top.
3. Sprinkle crushed mixed nuts.
4. Add a pinch of cinnamon.
5. Serve chilled.

snack.title: Paneer Tikka Bites
snack.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Paneer (100g, cubed)
Гўв‚¬Вў Yogurt (2 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Tikka masala (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Bell pepper chunks
Гўв‚¬Вў Onion chunks
Гўв‚¬Вў Lemon juice
Гўв‚¬Вў Oil for grilling
snack.health_benefits: High-protein snack from paneer with minimal carbs. Yogurt marinade is probiotic-rich. Bell peppers add vitamin C. Perfect pre-workout snack.
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Mix yogurt with tikka masala and lemon juice.
2. Toss paneer cubes in marinade, rest 30 mins.
3. Thread paneer, bell pepper, onion onto skewers.
4. Grill on high heat for 3-4 mins per side.
5. Serve hot with mint chutney.

snack.title: Dhokla
snack.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Besan / gram flour (100g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Yogurt (2 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Eno fruit salt (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Mustard seeds (1/2 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Curry leaves
Гўв‚¬Вў Green chili (1)
Гўв‚¬Вў Sugar (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Lemon juice
snack.health_benefits: Steamed snack, no oil used in cooking. Besan is high in protein and fiber. Fermentation from yogurt aids digestion. A guilt-free Gujarati classic.
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Mix besan, yogurt, water, turmeric, salt, sugar into smooth batter.
2. Just before steaming, add Eno and mix gently.
3. Pour into greased plate, steam 15 minutes.
4. For tadka: heat oil, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, green chili.
5. Pour tadka over steamed dhokla, cut into squares.

snack.title: Masala Chaas (Buttermilk)
snack.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Fresh yogurt (100ml)
Гўв‚¬Вў Water (150ml)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cumin powder (1/2 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Mint leaves (4-5)
Гўв‚¬Вў Ginger (small piece, grated)
Гўв‚¬Вў Black salt
Гўв‚¬Вў Coriander leaves
snack.health_benefits: Probiotic-rich for gut health. Aids digestion and cools the body. Virtually no fat. Cumin improves digestion and ginger reduces bloating.
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Blend yogurt and water until smooth.
2. Add cumin powder, grated ginger, and black salt.
3. Tear mint and coriander leaves, add to mixture.
4. Stir well.
5. Serve chilled over ice.

snack.title: Chicken Wings (Grilled)
snack.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Chicken wings (6 pieces)
Гўв‚¬Вў Yogurt (2 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Hot sauce (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Garlic powder (1/2 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Paprika (1/2 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Olive oil (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Salt & pepper
snack.health_benefits: High protein snack for muscle recovery. Grilling reduces fat compared to frying. Capsaicin from hot sauce boosts metabolism.
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Mix yogurt, hot sauce, garlic powder, paprika, salt.
2. Coat chicken wings in marinade, rest 1 hour.
3. Preheat oven to 220C or heat grill.
4. Bake/grill wings 25 minutes, flipping halfway.
5. Serve hot with celery sticks.

snack.title: Boiled Eggs with Pepper
snack.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Eggs (2)
Гўв‚¬Вў Black pepper
Гўв‚¬Вў Salt
Гўв‚¬Вў Chaat masala (optional)
snack.health_benefits: One of the most nutrient-dense foods on earth. Rich in complete protein, choline, and vitamin D. Zero prep, portable, and highly satisfying.
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Place eggs in a pot, cover with cold water.
2. Bring to boil, then cook for exactly 9 minutes.
3. Transfer to ice water for 5 minutes.
4. Peel and slice in half.
5. Sprinkle salt, pepper, and chaat masala.

snack.title: Chicken Seekh Kebab
snack.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Chicken mince (150g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Onion (1/4, finely minced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Ginger-garlic paste (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Green chili (1, minced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Garam masala (1/2 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Coriander leaves
Гўв‚¬Вў Egg (1, for binding)
Гўв‚¬Вў Oil for grilling
snack.health_benefits: Lean chicken mince is high in protein and low in fat. Spices like garam masala aid metabolism. A flavorful, filling snack without empty carbs.
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a bowl.
2. Shape mixture around metal skewers into long kebabs.
3. Refrigerate 30 minutes to firm up.
4. Grill on medium heat, rotating, for 12-15 minutes.
5. Serve with mint chutney and onion rings.

snack.title: Tuna Salad Cup
snack.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Canned tuna in water (100g)
Гўв‚¬Вў Celery (1 stalk, diced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Red onion (1 tbsp, minced)
Гўв‚¬Вў Olive oil (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Lemon juice (1 tsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Black pepper
Гўв‚¬Вў Lettuce cups (2)
snack.health_benefits: Tuna is extremely high in lean protein and omega-3 fats. Low calorie and highly satiating. Great for building lean muscle mass.
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Drain tuna and flake with a fork.
2. Mix with diced celery, red onion, olive oil, lemon juice.
3. Season with salt and black pepper.
4. Wash and dry lettuce leaves to form cups.
5. Spoon tuna mixture into lettuce cups and serve.

snack.title: Mixed Nuts Trail Mix
snack.ingredients:
Гўв‚¬Вў Almonds (10)
Гўв‚¬Вў Walnuts (5)
Гўв‚¬Вў Cashews (8)
Гўв‚¬Вў Raisins (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Pumpkin seeds (1 tbsp)
Гўв‚¬Вў Dark chocolate chips (1 tsp)
snack.health_benefits: Almonds are rich in vitamin E and healthy fats. Walnuts are the best nut source of omega-3. Dark chocolate provides antioxidants. A balanced energy-boosting snack.
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Combine all nuts and seeds in a bowl.
2. Add raisins and dark chocolate chips.
3. Mix well.
4. Portion into small bags or containers.
5. Store in a cool, dry place for up to 2 weeks.

snack.title: Hummus with Pita & Carrots
snack.ingredients: Chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, pita bread, carrots
snack.recipe_steps: 1. Blend chickpeas, tahini, and lemon. 2. Serve with sliced carrots and pita.
snack.health_benefits: Great source of plant protein and fiber.

snack.title: Masala Chai with Biscuits
snack.ingredients: Tea leaves, milk, ginger, cardamom, sugar, digestive biscuits
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Boil water with crushed ginger and cardamom.
2. Add tea leaves, simmer 2 min.
3. Add milk, bring to boil.
4. Strain, add sugar.
5. Serve with biscuits.
snack.health_benefits: Ginger and cardamom aid digestion, warming and comforting, boosts alertness.

snack.title: Sprouts Chaat
snack.ingredients: Mixed sprouts, onion, tomato, cucumber, lemon, chaat masala, coriander, green chutney
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Steam or boil sprouts.
2. Dice onion, tomato, cucumber.
3. Mix everything together.
4. Add lemon juice, chaat masala, salt.
5. Garnish with coriander, serve with green chutney.
snack.health_benefits: Excellent plant protein, enzyme-rich sprouts, low calorie, high fiber.

snack.title: Peanut Butter Banana Toast
snack.ingredients: Whole wheat bread, peanut butter, banana, honey, chia seeds
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Toast bread slices.
2. Spread peanut butter generously.
3. Slice banana and arrange on top.
4. Drizzle honey and sprinkle chia seeds.
5. Serve immediately.
snack.health_benefits: Healthy fats from peanut butter, potassium from banana, sustained energy.

snack.title: Trail Mix
snack.ingredients: Almonds, walnuts, cashews, pumpkin seeds, dried cranberries, dark chocolate chips
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Measure equal portions of nuts and seeds.
2. Add dried cranberries.
3. Toss in dark chocolate chips.
4. Mix well.
5. Store in an airtight container.
snack.health_benefits: Heart-healthy fats, antioxidants from dark chocolate, portable energy.

snack.title: Boiled Egg Salad
snack.ingredients: Boiled eggs, lettuce, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, olive oil, lemon, salt, pepper
snack.recipe_steps:
1. Boil eggs, peel and halve.
2. Arrange on a bed of lettuce.
3. Add sliced tomatoes and cucumber.
4. Drizzle olive oil, lemon juice.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
snack.health_benefits: High protein, low carb, excellent post-workout snack.
